---
output: github_document
---

<!-- README.md is generated from README.Rmd. Please edit that file -->

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.path = "man/figures/README-",
  out.width = "100%"
)
```

# xlamisc

<!-- badges: start -->
[![CRAN status](https://www.r-pkg.org/badges/version/xlamisc)](https://CRAN.R-project.org/package=xlamisc)
![R-CMD-check](https://github.com/r-xla/xlamisc/actions/workflows/R-CMD-check.yaml/badge.svg)
[![r-universe](https://r-xla.r-universe.dev/badges/xlamisc)](https://r-xla.r-universe.dev/xlamisc)
<!-- badges: end -->

Helper functions for xla
